  707:     db = get_db()

   62: def is_backup_file(p: Path) -> bool:
   63:     low_name = p.name.lower()
   64:     low_parts = [x.lower() for x in p.parts]
   65: 
   66:     # Klasör bazlı gerçek yedek/arşivler
   67:     for part in low_parts:
   68:         if part.startswith("_archive"):
   69:             return True

  143: def extract_templates_from_py(text: str):
  144:     found = set()
  145:     for m in re.findall(r"render_template\s*\(\s*['\"]([^'\"]+\.html)['\"]", text):
  146:         found.add(Path("templates") / m)
  147:     return found
  148: 
  149: def extract_templates_from_html(text: str):
  150:     found = set()
  151:     for m in re.findall(r"{%\s*(?:extends|include)\s+['\"]([^'\"]+\.html)['\"]", text):
  152:         found.add(Path("templates") / m)

  156:     found = set()
  157: 
  158:     # url_for('static', filename='...')
  159:     for m in re.findall(
  160:         r"url_for\(\s*['\"]static['\"]\s*,\s*filename\s*=\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]",
  161:         text
  162:     ):
  163:         found.add(Path("static") / m.split("?")[0])
  164: 
  165:     # /static/xxx.css veya /static/xxx.js

  158:     # url_for('static', filename='...')
  159:     for m in re.findall(
  160:         r"url_for\(\s*['\"]static['\"]\s*,\s*filename\s*=\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]",
  161:         text
  162:     ):
  163:         found.add(Path("static") / m.split("?")[0])

  166:     for m in re.findall(r"/static/([^'\"\s>)]+)", text):
  167:         clean = m.split("?")[0]

  253:         active.add(p)
  254: 
  255: # Python import + render_template taraması
  256: changed = True
  257: while changed:
  258:     changed = False
  259: 
  260:     for p in list(active):
  261:         abs_p = ROOT / p
  262:         text = read_text(abs_p)

  263: 
  264:         if p.suffix == ".py":
  265:             # render_template ile çağrılan template dosyaları
  266:             for t in extract_templates_from_py(text):
  267:                 if t in runtime_set and t not in active:
  268:                     active.add(t)
  269:                     changed = True
  270: 
  271:             # Yerel importları yakala
  272:             for m in re.findall(r"^\s*(?:from|import)\s+([a-zA-Z_][\w\.]*)", text, flags=re.M):

  694: def settings_get(key: str, default=None):
  695:     row = get_db().execute("SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key=?", (key,)).fetchone()
  696:     if not row:
  697:         return default
  698:     raw = row["value"]
  699:     try:
  700:         return json.loads(raw)
  701:     except Exception:

  704: 
  705: def settings_set(key: str, value) -> None:
  706:     raw = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False) if not isinstance(value, str) else value
  707:     db = get_db()
  708:     db.execute("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings(key, value) VALUES(?, ?)", (key, raw))
  709:     db.commit()

  705: def settings_set(key: str, value) -> None:
  706:     raw = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False) if not isinstance(value, str) else value
  707:     db = get_db()

   64:             full_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

   66:             photo_path TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
   67:             created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),

   78:         FROM admin_profile
   79:         WHERE id=1
   80:     """).fetchone()

  167:     ensure_security_table(db)
  168:     row = db.execute("SELECT password_hash FROM admin_security WHERE id=1").fetchone()
  169:     return row["password_hash"] if row else ""

  694: def settings_get(key: str, default=None):
  695:     row = get_db().execute("SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key=?", (key,)).fetchone()
  696:     if not row:
  697:         return default
  698:     raw = row["value"]
  699:     try:
  700:         return json.loads(raw)
  701:     except Exception:

  703: 
  704: 
  705: def settings_set(key: str, value) -> None:
  706:     raw = json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False) if not isinstance(value, str) else value
  707:     db = get_db()
  708:     db.execute("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO settings(key, value) VALUES(?, ?)", (key, raw))
  709:     db.commit()

  346: function maybeSpeakApproachStop(stopName, km){
  347:   if(!stopName) return;

  349:   if(km > 5) return;

 1319: };

  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] learned_commands
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - phrase TEXT default=None pk=0
  - phrase_norm TEXT default=None pk=0
  - skeleton TEXT default=None pk=0
  - intent TEXT default=None pk=0
  - pattern TEXT default=None pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] live_runtime_state
  - trip_id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - live_stop TEXT default='' pk=0
  - speed REAL default=0 pk=0
  - gps_km TEXT default='' pk=0
  - eta_main TEXT default='' pk=0
  - eta_sub TEXT default='' pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0

[TABLE] package_requests
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - requested_plan TEXT default=None pk=0
  - current_plan TEXT default=None pk=0
  - subscription_status TEXT default=None pk=0
  - note TEXT default=None pk=0
  - user_agent TEXT default=None pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=None pk=0
  - is_done INTEGER default=0 pk=0

[TABLE] route_profile_segments
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - profile_key TEXT default=None pk=2
  - from_stop TEXT default=None pk=3
  - to_stop TEXT default=None pk=4
  - sort_order INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - distance_m REAL default=0 pk=0
  - duration_s REAL default=0 pk=0
  - geometry_json TEXT default=None pk=0
  - provider TEXT default='osrm' pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0

[TABLE] route_profile_vias
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - profile_key TEXT default=None pk=2
  - from_stop TEXT default=None pk=3
  - to_stop TEXT default=None pk=4
  - via_name TEXT default=None pk=5
  - lat REAL default=None pk=0
  - lng REAL default=None pk=0
  - sort_order INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0

[TABLE] route_profiles
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - profile_key TEXT default=None pk=2
  - title TEXT default=None pk=0
  - note TEXT default='' pk=0
  - is_default INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=None pk=0

[TABLE] route_schedule_items
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - profile_id INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - stop_name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - planned_time TEXT default='' pk=0
  - segment_km REAL default=NULL pk=0
  - is_timed INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - sort_order INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - note TEXT default='' pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] route_schedule_profiles
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - route_name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - title TEXT default=None pk=0
  - direction TEXT default='gidis' pk=0
  - is_default INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - note TEXT default='' pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] route_segment_vias
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - from_stop TEXT default=None pk=2
  - to_stop TEXT default=None pk=3
  - via_name TEXT default=None pk=4
  - lat REAL default=None pk=0
  - lng REAL default=None pk=0
  - sort_order INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0

[TABLE] route_segments
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - from_stop TEXT default=None pk=2
  - to_stop TEXT default=None pk=3
  - sort_order INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - distance_m REAL default=0 pk=0
  - duration_s REAL default=0 pk=0
  - geometry_json TEXT default=None pk=0
  - provider TEXT default='osrm' pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP pk=0

[TABLE] route_stop_coords
  - route TEXT default=None pk=1
  - stop TEXT default=None pk=2
  - lat REAL default=None pk=0
  - lng REAL default=None pk=0

[TABLE] route_stops
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - route_name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - stop_name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - seq INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - lat REAL default=None pk=0
  - lng REAL default=None pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] routes
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - stops TEXT default=None pk=0

[TABLE] seats
  - trip_id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - seat_no INTEGER default=None pk=2
  - stop TEXT default=None pk=0
  - ticket_type TEXT default=None pk=0
  - payment TEXT default=None pk=0
  - amount REAL default=None pk=0
  - gender TEXT default='' pk=0
  - pair_ok INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - service INTEGER default=0 pk=0
  - service_note TEXT default=None pk=0
  - from_stop TEXT default='' pk=0
  - to_stop TEXT default='' pk=0
  - passenger_name TEXT default='' pk=0
  - passenger_phone TEXT default='' pk=0

[TABLE] settings
  - key TEXT default=None pk=1
  - value TEXT default=None pk=0

[TABLE] sqlite_sequence
  - name  default=None pk=0
  - seq  default=None pk=0

[TABLE] stop_logs
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - trip_id INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - stop_name TEXT default=None pk=0
  - event TEXT default=None pk=0
  - distance_km REAL default=None pk=0
  - seats_for_stop INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - meta_json TEXT default=None pk=0
  - ts TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] track_state
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - trip_id INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - next_stop TEXT default=None pk=0
  - threshold_km REAL default=3.0 pk=0
  - sound_on INTEGER default=1 pk=0
  - auto_advance INTEGER default=1 pk=0
  - last_lat REAL default=None pk=0
  - last_lng REAL default=None pk=0
  - last_ts TEXT default=None pk=0
  - avg_speed_kmh REAL default=None pk=0
  - distance_km REAL default=None pk=0
  - eta_min REAL default=None pk=0
  - updated_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

[TABLE] trips
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - date TEXT default=None pk=0
  - route TEXT default=None pk=0
  - departure_time TEXT default=None pk=0
  - plate TEXT default=None pk=0
  - captain1 TEXT default=None pk=0
  - captain2 TEXT default=None pk=0
  - attendant TEXT default=None pk=0
  - note TEXT default=None pk=0

[TABLE] walk_on_sales
  - id INTEGER default=None pk=1
  - trip_id INTEGER default=None pk=0
  - from_stop TEXT default=None pk=0
  - to_stop TEXT default=None pk=0
  - pax INTEGER default=1 pk=0
  - unit_price REAL default=0 pk=0
  - total_amount REAL default=0 pk=0
  - payment TEXT default='nakit' pk=0
  - note TEXT default=None pk=0
  - created_at TEXT default=datetime('now','localtime') pk=0

- Sahada daha akıllı sefer yönetimi.
- İşte öne çıkan başlıklar.
- Koltuk planı. Tek bakışta tüm yolcular.
- Canlı durak. İnişleri kaçırma.
- Sesli komut. Ekrana daha az bak.
- Hesap ve tahsilat. Sefer sonunda netlik.
- Az dokunuş. Daha fazla kontrol.
- Her özellik kendi sahnesinde.
- Yolcu bilgisi kaybolmaz.
- Sıradaki nokta hep belli.
- Konuş. Sistem cevaplasın.
- Detaylı kullanım rehberi.
- 1 Dakikada Öğren
- Sesli Komutlar
- Sık Yapılan İşlemler
- Sürüşte Kullanım
- Bir Şey Ters Gidiyorsa
- Hazır Komut Listesi
